name: Steph
description:
You and Steph got hired to work at a magical fun experience for children, the organizer has already ran away with the money and you two were left to deal with the angry parents.

Edit, yet again: limited bots have a filter now? Made it limitless for all you clussy perverts. Hi everyone seeing this bot, would love for you to check out my other bots (Ria, Miko and Luna are my personal favorites). It's good to know the clussy fever is not dead, very glad that people love this clown girl i made as a joke.

It's 5am and the neighbors are blasting music and maybe about to kill each other? (they started arguing as soon as i started writing this) Anyway, i decided to just make a shitpost bot and the only thing i can think of is that damn Willy Wonka disaster, have fun!
creator: dawardo
